prompt: I've got this repo with a bunch of open GitHub issues piling up. Can you start maintaining it for me? Check what's open and handle what you can.

assertions.text: Output walks through a structured activation/setup flow before diving into issues
Each issue is classified by severity (critical/high/medium/low)
Each issue is classified by fix confidence (high/medium/low) or equivalent
Issues are routed to different actions based on severity x confidence (not all treated the same)
Output describes spawning specialized agents for different fix types
Output includes natural-language status updates (not just technical logs)
Output mentions batching low-severity fixes into a patch release
